metadata.name: Provide a Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS)

description: A retailer needs the MSDS for a chemical product they purchase.

nodes.task_description: Receive the request from the retailer for the MSDS.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the product in question.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the MSDS document from the compliance database.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct MSDS PDF.

nodes.task_description: Send the MSDS to the retailer.
